title: wire the perf CLI group into bee.mjs + update CLI tests
action: Register a new perf command group in skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs and its registry per the confirmed insertion points. (1) command-registry.mjs: append perf.start / perf.stop / perf.section / perf.log / perf.render entries (name, invoke, description, parameters JSON-Schema, examples that MUST run without error, deprecated:null). (2) bee.mjs: import needed fns from './lib/perf.mjs'; add HANDLERS rows perf.start|perf.stop|perf.section|perf.log|perf.render -> handlePerf* fns; add perf:perfUsageFallback to GROUP_USAGE_FALLBACKS and write perfUsageFallback(leading) matching existing fallbacks; add boolean-alone flags (e.g. json, markdown) to FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS; implement handlePerfStart/Stop/Section/Log/Render(root,flags) returning {result,text} — start writes .bee/perf-open.json marker (resolved transcript path + startTs + sessionId + project + branch), stop reads marker + computes via lib + appendSection + clears marker, section is the one-shot --since variant, log/render read the global log. Handlers NEVER call console.log directly. (3) test_bee_cli.mjs: add perf to the three hardcoded group lists (~line 167 inline array, ~198 GROUP_NAMES, ~270 allowedGroups Set) and add a check block calling assertExampleOk for each perf verb. Keep examples side-effect-safe (BEEHIVE_PERF_DIR temp dir, or read-only examples).

truths: perf group registered at ALL THREE surfaces: COMMAND_REGISTRY, HANDLERS, GROUP_USAGE_FALLBACKS (+perfUsageFallback).
Handlers return {result,text}; --json handled by emit(); no direct console.log/process.stdout.
bee perf start writes .bee/perf-open.json recording the resolved transcript path so stop reads the same file; stop clears it.
Handlers degrade gracefully: perf stop with no open marker, and perf start/stop/section with no resolvable transcript, return a clear {result,text} — NEVER throw/crash.
test_bee_cli.mjs three group lists include perf and every perf registry example runs without error.

Registry examples[] for start/stop/section MUST be crash-safe under assertExampleOk (they run in a transcript-less CI); prefer shipping only read-only log/render as registry examples and covering start/stop/section behavior in test_perf.mjs with a fixture transcript + BEEHIVE_PERF_DIR temp.
artifacts: handlePerf* fns + HANDLERS + GROUP_USAGE_FALLBACKS wiring in bee.mjs
perf group blocks + group-list updates in test_bee_cli.mjs
prohibitions: Do NOT re-implement aggregation here — import from lib/perf.mjs (perf-log-1).
Do NOT edit .bee/bin/ copies here — mirroring is perf-log-3.
No perf example that writes to the real global dir during tests (use BEEHIVE_PERF_DIR temp).
Do NOT import perf.mjs from command-registry.mjs (only bee.mjs imports it) — protects the VENDORED_LIB_MODULES fixture (W3).
FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS already contains 'json' (bee.mjs:1827) — add only genuinely new boolean-alone flags (e.g. 'markdown'); do not duplicate.
